actionable_predicate: Before walking out of an engineering moment under load, ask which specific peers will witness the withdrawal and what their default-model of mid-execution exit looks like. The exit's shape (handover quality, public-record explanation, runbook completeness) is the only input that reroutes that model.
roadmap_application: PM use: in a stay-or-leave conversation with a senior engineer, the verse provides specific diagnostic questions — who will witness this exit, what model will they form, and what shape of exit changes that model. This is concrete enough to drive an actual conversation about transition planning, not vague brand-talk.
verdict_reason: The implication is testable, the falsifiability narrows it from 'reputation is everything' to a specific class of peer-cognition events, and the counter_example handles the case of compromised peer-networks. PASS on both 7.3 and 3.11.
